SEARCH
Package client.view

Class CancellationsReportController

java.lang.Object
client.view.BaseController
client.view.CancellationsReportController
public class CancellationsReportController extends BaseController
Cancellations report screen, visible to a DEPT_MANAGER only (gated in MainShellController). The manager picks a date range and a park — or "All parks" for the whole region — and clicks Generate to run REPORT_CANCELLATIONS.

The centrepiece is a BarChart: one category per active day along the x-axis, with two grouped bars — "Cancelled" and "No-show" — carrying the day's counts on the y-axis. A small summary line beneath it repeats the range totals and the average per day. Every figure is read straight off the server's CancellationsReportDTO — nothing is aggregated client-side. The chart mirrors VisitsReportController for visual consistency.

Extends BaseController for navigation-lifecycle parity; it holds no push subscriptions.

    private static final record 
    CancellationsReportController.ParkOption
    Park dropdown entry: carries the id (null for "All parks") but renders the name.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    initialize()
    FXML lifecycle hook: sets default dates, the y-axis, and loads parks.
    private void
    loadParks()
    Populates the park dropdown from the server via LIST_PARKS, with an "All parks" option (id null) at the top for a region-wide report.
    private void
    onGenerate()
    Generate-button handler: validates inputs and runs REPORT_CANCELLATIONS.
    private void
    render(CancellationsReportDTO report)
    Paints the per-day chart and the range-summary line from the server's report.
    private void
    showPlaceholder(boolean empty)
    Swaps between the chart (with its summary line) and the empty-range placeholder.

  • Constructor Details

    • CancellationsReportController

      public CancellationsReportController(NetworkService network, Session session)
      Creates the cancellations-report controller.
      Parameters:
      network - the shared network service
      session - the current client session

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      private void initialize()
      FXML lifecycle hook: sets default dates, the y-axis, and loads parks.

    • loadParks

      private void loadParks()
      Populates the park dropdown from the server via LIST_PARKS, with an "All parks" option (id null) at the top for a region-wide report.

    • onGenerate

      private void onGenerate()
      Generate-button handler: validates inputs and runs REPORT_CANCELLATIONS.

    • render

      private void render(CancellationsReportDTO report)
      Paints the per-day chart and the range-summary line from the server's report. The x-axis categories are the report's dates (oldest first); each date carries a "Cancelled" and a "No-show" bar. An empty range shows a placeholder instead of a bare chart. Every figure comes straight off the CancellationsReportDTO.
      Parameters:
      report - the server's report result

    • showPlaceholder

      private void showPlaceholder(boolean empty)
      Swaps between the chart (with its summary line) and the empty-range placeholder.
      Parameters:
      empty - true to show the placeholder, false for the chart
